title: Filter Users with computed
short_description: Practice deriving filtered UI state with computed instead of manually updating a second value.
description: In this challenge, you will complete a small user filter component using Vue's computed function.
The goal is to derive filteredUsers from search and users, letting Vue recalculate the list only when its reactive dependencies change.
instructions: Turn filteredUsers into a computed property.
Filter users by comparing each name against search.value in a case-insensitive way.
Keep clearSearch focused on resetting search.value.

hints.title: Import computed
hints.body: The import can include both ref and computed: import { computed, ref } from "vue".

hints.title: Derive, do not duplicate
hints.body: filteredUsers should be computed from users.value and search.value. You do not need another ref for the filtered list.

hints.title: Normalize the search
hints.body: Use toLowerCase() on both the user's name and the search text so the filter works regardless of capitalization.
